title: The Salvage Monkeys Arrive
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on the salvage monkeys appear. Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Salvage Monkeys Appear sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Narrator, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But my dream had too many enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So let me stay on this ship.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What would you say is your specialty?

summary: Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
